feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: standard LIKP table not getting activated after append structure and doing se14
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am badly in need of help as client is waiting to move the tr into production. Plz help me with this issue.

 


I have added new field to the exising append structure zzlikp_append as per the business requirement to the standard table likp.
I have done se14 adjust and activate. 

The thing is that it is not throwing any error it is just processing. I would like to know how much time it will take to process 25000 records in my sandbox. it is more than 2 hours. 

I also faced one dump of 

TYPELOAD_NEW_VERSION”

which is not getting now. Neither it is showing any error. 

The only page in front of me is 

Is there any way to know how much time it will complete ?
or should I have to do anything to fix this issue ?

entry.title: What is the Better way for developing Reports in SAP S/4 Hana private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition implementation, it would be grateful  if you could suggest what is the better way for developing Reports in Private Edition?

Whether we need to develop in ALV Reports in SE38 or any other feasible way for developing in Private edition?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to Develop Adobe Forms in SAP S/4 Private Edition like Public Edition through Binding Fields?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Is it feasible to develop Adobe forms in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition through Binding Fields(XML) similar to how we do in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps needs to be followed for development of Adobe Forms in Private Edition.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to merge DMS object (eg. PDF/JPEG) to an Adobe form output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to merge DMS object (eg. PNG/JPEG) to an Adobe form output?

I am able to merge .PDF type documents from DMS to the adobe form output using class cl_rspo_pdf_merge but how to merge .PNG type documents?

Kindly help.

 

Thank you,

Priyanka.

entry.title: How to hide Custom field in Billing Document item based on condition in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to hide custom fields in Billing Document Item based on Condition? Same requirement i had in Sale order screen and achieved it through BADI. But i don't see similar BADI released for billing document to set properties of custom fields to Invisible / mandatory / read-only?

It would be grateful if you could help me in hiding custom fields in billing document item level.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Custom fields flow from Sale order to Purchase Requisition and Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I have created few custom fields in Sale order item level, and i wanted those to flow to Purchase requisition and Purchase order in SAP S4HANA Public Edition.

I checked in Business Scenarios Tab while creating custom fields but unable to find PR and PO to enable.

It would be grateful if you could help me.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to develop customized reports in in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to develop Customized Reports in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps to develop customized reports.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to generate spool in SAP ABAP on Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,
I am calling my custom fragment-based adobe form using the class cl_somu_form_services method get_document which returns the XSTRING. I need to generate spool but could not find a way to achieve it.

With interface-based Adobe forms, it was very simple. Is there a way to generate spool in cloud development?

Thanks,
Sachin

entry.title: Error in Object Dependency Procedure
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a procedure using CU01 and am attempting to clear a characteristic value of the 'Date Format' data type.The following is the OD code, which is currently producing a syntax error. The error disappears if I remove t line# 2. Could you please help me resolve this issue?

 

 

 $SELF.DELTA_FLAG ?= 'N' IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' ',
 $SELF.CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ?= ' 'IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' ',
 $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP = 'X' IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' '.

 

 

Regards,

Mukhtar

SAP Variant Configuration and PricingPLM Variant Configuration

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: Cloud alternative of DESCRIBE FIELD dobj [TYPE typ [COMPONENTS com]] ??
entry.content:
I get error stating DESCRIBE is not allowed in current language version. 
My code is below:

    DESCRIBE FIELD <ls_dyn> TYPE DATA(lv_type) COMPONENTS DATA(lv_comp).

I know we have alternative for DESCRIBE TABLE.
But what should be done for DESCRIBE FIELD? 
DESCRIBE FIELD abapdocu 

Thanks!

entry.title: How to make custom fields flow from Sales order to PR and PO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts!!

I have created custom fields in Sales order item level in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition. How to make those custom fields flow to Purchase Requisition item and Purchase order item level.

I checked in Business Scenerios option in Custom fields tab while creating custom fields, but there PR and PR is not there.

It would be grateful if you could help me out.

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: VL01N FIELD validation with Z_USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCEMENT causing error DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
As per the business requirement , I have added custom field ZZETA to LIKP table along with screen enhancement using BADI LE_SHP_TAB_CUST_HEAD.
TR got moved to production and everything was working fine. Now the user asked me he needs validation before saving in VL01N for ZZETA which I have added.
I have done some research and implemented the implicit enhancement for USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT in MV50AFZ1 .

                                   
The following is the code used in the enhancement implementation.

I am just validating the custom field with empty ZZETA and the following message is getting displayed

So far it is fine.

Now I have inserted ZZETA date and saved. 

The document got saved.

When I closed the page the following page is getting displayed.

 From ST22 analysis,

ABAP programming error
DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR
CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB
SAPLV05I
An exception has occurred in class "CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB". This exception was not
caught
in procedure "SD_PARTNER_UPDATE" "(FUNCTION)" or propagated by a RAISING
clause.
Since the caller of the procedure could not have anticipated this
exception, the current program was terminated.
The reason for the exception occurring was:
The reason for the exception is:
When an Open SQL array insert is performed, trying to insert a record
into the database table "VBPA" causes the function to terminate if a
record with the same key already exists.

The major concern here is though it is showing that Delivery of the product has been saved , it is not

getting updated in the LIKP table.



However, I am not working on VBPA table in this scenario. How to fix this error ?

Is that the code which is causing the issue, though there is no syntax error ? OR 

is this the wrong FM USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT I have used for validation ?

I am completely clueless now..............................Plz give me some hint how to proceed further.

entry.title: How to input Internal Table as a Parameter for execute Procedure from Oracle Database
entry.content:
Here is my code look like

exec sql

execute procedure scheme.package.my_procedure (
            IN :lv_a,
            IN :itab_a,
            IN :itab_b,
            INOUT :lv_c,
            OUT :lv_d
            )

endexec.
I got the error 'The DSQL interface was called with invalid parameters.' I assume this error came from the internal table that is not recognized by Oracle database, meanwhile in the Oracle database itab_a and itab_b are PL/SQL Table.

Can anyone please help me, how to execute oracle database procedure that has PL/SQL TAble parameter from SAP ABAP

entry.title: Setup my Variant with Changeable Period
entry.content:
Hello everyone , 

i want to create a variant for background job. 

The variant has a Field "Posting Period" and i want to be changeable every month.

How can i do this ?

My job run a Report every end of month. 

How can i have different Value every month on my Variant ?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: How to enable PDF Preview in smart form print preview
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I can observe PDF Preview is disabled in my smart form output. Can some one help me to how i can i enable this option ? can we fix it via abap ?

entry.title: calculation in final internal table in amdp class
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a AMDP class where the final itab is a join of several itabs.

I wrote this code initially as normal abap report and since the execution time was much longer I am approaching it as AMDP class.

 

How can I write this in my amdp select

entry.title: Is it possible to call a fix URL from IW52 trasnaction (Adding a cutom button there)?
entry.content: I want to add a custom button to IW51/IW52/IW53 and on click of this button a specific url should be called. For example Button "EFA-SmartAssist" in below snapshot I want to add.

entry.title: How to call Asynchronous SOAP Web service from ABAP class in S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a business requirement to create Main assets in S4 HANA public cloud system(2402), from a custom RAP implementation class.

we have created  the required Communication arrangements in S4 public cloud ( Communication user/system/arrangements) for communication scenario SAP_COM_0563.Outbound service also active in the comm arrangement.

We have tested this SOAP service using SOAP UI tool and its working fine and Assets documents are also getting created in the system.

But We are trying to use the same SOAP API from custom class from eclipse after we creating the service consumption model. and we are getting an error stating "Logical Port does not belong to consumer proxy".

Followed the steps mentioned in this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-soap-web-services..html

SOAP API - used : https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview

Could some one please suggest us how to resolve this, or please suggest the correct approach to be followed to consume the SOAP Web service from custom ABAP class.

entry.title: Find Text object Code from SO10 smartforms
entry.content:
Hello Mates, 

I am currently working with Smart Forms and have encountered an issue with an include text. When attempting to find the actual code in SO10 using the text name and text ID, the system returns no results. Could you advise on what specific input is required to retrieve the underlying code for the text?
